title: Draw Steel Kit
description: A kit definition for Draw Steel, providing equipment, stat bonuses, and a signature ability.

name.description: The name of the kit (e.g., "Cloak and Dagger", "Shining Armor").

armor.description: Armor categories granted by the kit (e.g., ["Light Armor"], ["Heavy Armor", "Shield"]).

weapon.description: Weapon types granted by the kit (e.g., ["Light Weapon"], ["Medium Weapon", "Bow"]).

equipment_text.description: Raw equipment description (e.g., "You wear light armor and wield one or two light weapons.").

stamina_bonus.description: Stamina bonus (e.g., "+3 per echelon", "+12 per echelon").

melee_damage_bonus.description: Melee damage bonus across three tiers (e.g., "+2/+2/+2").

ranged_damage_bonus.description: Ranged damage bonus across three tiers (e.g., "+0/+0/+4").

signature_ability.description: The kit's signature ability as a full Feature object.

content.description: Raw markdown body of the kit description.
